meaning: adj.珊瑚的,产生珊瑚的n.珊瑚,珊瑚状动物,珊瑚状构造
examples: The chiton’s pinkbackground camouflages it from predators as it feeds on coralline algae.
Objective: To discuss the filling effects of coralline hydroxyapatite (CHA) in curettage of jaw cysts.
Objective To study the biocompatibility of the coralline hydroxyapatite combined with bone morphogenetic protein(CCHA).
